CREATE TABLE test_format (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, name FROM test_format FORMAT PrettyCompact;
SELECT id, name FROM test_format WHERE id > 1 FORMAT JSON;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_format FORMAT CSV;
SELECT id, name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM test_format WHERE id <= 2) subquery FORMAT LineJSON;
SELECT t1.id, t2.name FROM test_format AS t1 JOIN test_format AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id FORMAT Nullable;
SELECT id, SUM(if(name = 'Alice', 1, 0)) AS alice_count FROM test_format GROUP BY id FORMAT TabSeparated;
SELECT id, name FROM test_format WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_format WHERE name = 'Bob') FORMAT Vertical;
